news_items.headline: Shutout streak for Phils' Sánchez ends shy of 51
news_items.summary: Phillies ace Cristopher Sánchez finally gave up a run after 663 pitches, 190 batters faced and 50⅔ scoreless innings -- a feat that put the Phillies' ace among Hall of Fame company.

news_items.headline: Manfred admits concern talks will end in lockout
news_items.summary: With the currrent CBA set to expire Dec. 1, MLB commissioner Rob Manfred acknowledged he has concerns that labor negotiations will lead to a lengthy work stoppage.

news_items.headline: Jays acquire Richardson from Twins for cash
news_items.summary: The Toronto Blue Jays have acquired right-hander Simeon Woods Richardson from the Minnesota Twins for cash considerations.

news_items.headline: Mets option Tong to Triple-A, recall Gerber for pe...
news_items.summary: The Mets optioned righty Jonah Tong to Triple-A Syracuse on Wednesday before their series finale against the Mariners.

news_items.headline: Padres DFA Castellanos after rough 39-game stint
news_items.summary: The San Diego Padres designated outfielder Nick Castellanos for assignment on Wednesday, one day after he received a video tribute in his return to Philadelphia.

news_items.headline: Giants reliever Gage to IL with knee inflammation
news_items.summary: Giants left-handed reliever Matt Gage, who leads the team with 29 appearances this season, has gone on the 15-day injured list with right knee inflammation.

news_items.headline: Shohei Ohtani lowers ERA to 0.74 with 6 scoreless innings, leads NL in OBP
news_items.summary: Only two pitchers in the history of baseball have a better ERA through their first 10 starts in a season. You can probably assume Ohtani is better at hitting than them.
